name: Vendor Risk Assessment Template.pdf
text:
[Page 1]
Meridian Holdings  Frontend Demo Grounded Corpus
RSK-001  Vendor Risk Assessment Template
Controlled synthetic enterprise document — for retrieval, review, and workflow testing.
Page 1
DOCUMENT CONTROL
Vendor Risk Assessment Template
Spreadsheet-export style assessment register used for vendor review and action tracking.
Document ID
RSK-001
Owner
Vendor Risk Management
Format
Spreadsheet export to PDF
Snapshot Date
2024-03-14
Status
Active assessment
Synthetic corporate document for demo, evaluation, and retrieval workflows only. All parties, people, systems, repositories, and events are fictional.
Worksheet export from the Vendor Risk workspace. The sheet below is intentionally preserved in a spreadsheet-like layout to test PDF extraction from dense operational tables.
Vendor
Domain
Assessment Question
Current Position / Evidence
Owner
Due
Status
Residual
Risk
Northwind Cloud
Systems
Contracting
Is there a liability cap aligned to
Meridian baseline?
MSA v4.2 Section 7.3 is
unlimited; baseline calls for 2×
annual value.
Maria Santos
2024-03-22
In progress
Critical
Northwind Cloud
Systems
Privacy
Is EU transfer mechanism
documented?
DPA Appendix C reserved; no
executed SCC package attached.
James Park
2024-03-25
Open
High
Northwind Cloud
Systems
Availability
Does SLA meet enterprise
target?
Current SLA sets 99.5% monthly
uptime; Meridian target is
99.95%.
Maria Santos
2024-03-20
Done
Medium
Northwind Cloud
Systems
Security
Is incident notification window
explicit?
Policy and MSA use vague
reasonable-efforts language.
Alex Rivera
2024-03-28
Open
High
Northwind Cloud
Systems
Operational
Has vendor SOC2 Type II
report been reviewed?
Awaiting vendor response and
report delivery.
Alex Rivera
2024-04-01
Blocked
Medium
Northwind Cloud
Systems
Subprocess
ors
Are material changes
proactively notified?
Portal notice only; formal change
notice process requested.
Olivia Grant
2024-03-27
Open
Medium
Open Dependencies
●
Blocked item mirrors frontend action ai6: SOC2 Type II report pending from vendor.

[Page 2]
Meridian Holdings  Frontend Demo Grounded Corpus
RSK-001  Vendor Risk Assessment Template
Controlled synthetic enterprise document — for retrieval, review, and workflow testing.
Page 2
●
Rows intentionally map to the key contract, privacy, SLA, and incident-response findings for cross-workflow grounding.
